info.title: claimledger
info.description: ClaimLedger CLI - Verify, inspect, attest, cite, revoke, witness, and timestamp scientific claims with cryptographic provenance.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: ClaimLedger - Cryptographic provenance verification for scientific claims

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify a claim bundle's cryptographic validity

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Inspect a claim bundle without verification

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: attest
commands.description: Create an attestation for a claim bundle

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: attestations
commands.description: List attestations in a claim bundle

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: cite
commands.description: Add a citation to another claim

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: citations
commands.description: List citations in a claim bundle

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: revoke-key
commands.description: Create a key revocation

arguments.name: key-file
arguments.description: Path to key file to revoke

commands.name: revocations
commands.description: List revocations in a directory

arguments.name: directory
arguments.description: Directory containing revocation bundles

commands.name: witness
commands.description: Create a witness timestamp attestation for a claim

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: tsa-request
commands.description: Create an RFC 3161 timestamp request for a claim

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: tsa-attach
commands.description: Attach an RFC 3161 timestamp token to a claim

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: timestamps
commands.description: List RFC 3161 timestamp receipts in a claim bundle

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: pack
commands.description: Create a portable ClaimPack from a claim bundle

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to root claim bundle JSON file

commands.name: verify-pack
commands.description: Verify a ClaimPack with one command

arguments.name: pack
arguments.description: Path to ClaimPack directory

commands.name: pack-inspect
commands.description: Inspect a ClaimPack without verification

arguments.name: pack
arguments.description: Path to ClaimPack directory

commands.name: pack-sign
commands.description: Sign a ClaimPack manifest

arguments.name: pack
arguments.description: Path to ClaimPack directory

commands.name: pack-diff
commands.description: Compare two ClaimPacks and show differences

arguments.name: pack-a
arguments.description: Path to base pack (old version)

arguments.name: pack-b
arguments.description: Path to updated pack (new version)

commands.name: pack-validate-update
commands.description: Validate a pack update against a policy

arguments.name: pack-a
arguments.description: Path to base pack (old version)

arguments.name: pack-b
arguments.description: Path to updated pack (new version)

commands.name: registry
commands.description: Manage local claim registries for offline resolution

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a new registry

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to create registry at

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a pack to the registry

arguments.name: registry
arguments.description: Path to registry

arguments.name: pack
arguments.description: Path to pack (directory or .zip)

commands.name: build
commands.description: Rebuild or refresh registry index

arguments.name: registry
arguments.description: Path to registry

commands.name: query
commands.description: Query registry for claims or bundles

arguments.name: registry
arguments.description: Path to registry

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publish a claim bundle as a ready-to-share ClaimPack

arguments.name: claim
arguments.description: Path to claim bundle JSON file
